title: REBUILD OF EVANGELION 01 DVD Release
wikitext:
[]: REBUILD OF EVANGELION 01 DVD Release?             Quote Post by FinalImpactCrisis » Tue Jan 08, 2008 1:47 pm Has anyone heard anything? Can't seem to find anything online. FIC

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Jan 08, 2008 2:41 pm Found rumours (from trusted sauces) about a release for next spring (northern hemisphere)

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:18 pm SSD has secondhand knowledge of it coming out March sometime

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Jan 08, 2008 6:23 pm IMAGE MACRO BAD. THIS IS NOT /b/ SAUCE(S), plz I checked Amazon to see if there's even an arbitrary date being pushed, but they only have the muzak from the movie right now IMDb still says it will be "released" in the US on February 22, but wtf does that even MEAN? :? will it be out on DVD/Blu-ray/bitTorrent or will be on the big screen? if it will be in theaters, how "wide" will the release be? and either way, will there even be subtitles or will we have to endure some dub? SOMEBODY ANSWER ME RIGHT NOW GOD DAMMIT!!!!!! thus far, I am VERY disappointed with how little info there is out there on Webuild as a whole after years and YEARS of stuff getting leaked early, it is SHOCKING IMO how tightly Anno-sensei has their proverbial finger wrapped around this thing [/rant]

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Tue Jan 08, 2008 6:38 pm Isn't that a good thing? I wouldn't want to know much about the movies before they come out. Why ruin your virgin experience of it with crappy quality? But I still would like to know a release date. That's different.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Jan 08, 2008 6:43 pm well, don't get me wrong it's NOT that I want to know the SPOILERS, download a crappy Torrent of it or anything like those I just want to know when (and maybe where) I could snatch up a DVD of it or possibly head to the local "art house" theater to see it, THAT'S ALL, and IMO it should not be so ridiculously hard to find out these kinds of things

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Tue Jan 08, 2008 7:23 pm Given how it takes over 5 months for a DVD to come out anyway, and the possibility of releasing both an Evangelion DVD AND theatrical sequel to coincide with Easter makes me think March.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 08, 2008 8:55 pm A friend of mine who's from Japan (and who's brother is a HUGE Eva fan) and actually went their this Winter told me that it'll be out in March. Whether or not the date will be pushed back or what have you is another thing though. Of course, this is in terms of the Japanese release date, so Holy Yui-sama only knows in terms of the states-wise one. Also: The IMDb is a lie. From what I've seen, the info there is sometimes almost as bad as Leaky is.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:42 pm The whole Eva 1.0 US release in Feb 22 is bullshit. Its IMDB for one. Second, the possibiltiy of the film getting a theatrical release in teh U.S. is remarkably small and if it was to be so the release would be miniscule (like how ADVFilms played 5 Centimeters Per Second in like 1 theater before releasing it on DVD in March...P.S. When the fuck do I get my "The Girl Who Leapt Through Time" Region 1 DVD) As for Feb 22 being a DVD release? No bite. Feb 22 is a Friday and DVD's come out on Tuesdays. But March Japan release for Eva 1.0 sounds like the honest truth. Could this mean a late March, early April release of 2.0. Or at least another wonky subtitle. Eva 2.0.: I Am (Possibly) Still Alone

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Wed Jan 09, 2008 6:18 pm Why Tuesdays instead of Friday?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jan 09, 2008 6:46 pm Don't know. Thats just the way the release schedules work. By the way- ZODIAC: DIRECTOR'S CUT came out Tuesday. Buy it!

[]:             Quote Post by Machinehead » Wed Jan 09, 2008 9:00 pm By the way- ZODIAC: DIRECTOR'S CUT came out Tuesday. Buy it!

[]:             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Wed Jan 09, 2008 9:13 pm Am I the only one who has sunk to the LAZIEST of all levels? I don't want to download massive files. I don't care that much. I'm literally so lazy, I want to just go to the store and buy it. Apathy: The Motion Picture industry's best pal.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 09, 2008 9:32 pm macrossmaster wrote: Am I the only one who has sunk to the LAZIEST of all levels? I don't want to download massive files. I don't care that much. I'm literally so lazy, I want to just go to the store and buy it. Apathy: The Motion Picture industry's best pal.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Thu Jan 10, 2008 11:32 am Ornette wrote: macrossmaster wrote: Am I the only one who has sunk to the LAZIEST of all levels? I don't want to download massive files. I don't care that much. I'm literally so lazy, I want to just go to the store and buy it. Apathy: The Motion Picture industry's best pal.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Sat Jan 19, 2008 8:24 am Has there been any talk what-so-ever about a US release of anything? I just want to get my hands on a copy of it, whether it be sub'd or dub'd

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Jan 19, 2008 8:42 am Is it just me or is it starting to leak through now? I've seen part 2of2 of a screener that I passed on.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sat Jan 19, 2008 10:52 am Anno is going to meet my spoon if he doesnt hurry up with that damned dvd.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Jan 21, 2008 7:01 am Official release date: May 21 http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/rss_det.cgi?news_c=10670&newsctg_c=1001 special version on april 25 http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/rss_det.cgi?news_c=10671&newsctg_c=1001

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 21, 2008 12:24 pm Those two links are exactly the same. Also, the special version comes out first? I'm assuming 'tis more expensive, but what's different about it? The point is, does it have subtitles? We know it's already been translated because of the Pusan festival.
